arts.ttl: Emery issues Celtic message as he rages at Aston Villa's Champions League defeat to Monaco
arts.sum: Unai Emery rages as Aston Villa blow top-eight chances in the Champions League On some players not following his plan and elaborating on it, Emery then points to his head: “We want it and we need it,” added the Villa manager on the mentality of not being strong enough.”

arts.ttl: “We’ll see what happens” – Excited player aware of Celtic interest, sounds up for move
arts.sum: Celtic are apparently working on improving their attack in the winter market to provide Brendan Rodgers better options for the second half of the season. The Scottish Premiership champions have already been linked to a few forwards and the list includes BK Häcken’s Zeidane Inoussa. arts.ttl: From big moments to big worries - what's the script with Celtic's Idah?
arts.sum: Adam Idah produced more than one heroic moment during his loan spell with Celtic last season, received a hero's welcome when he made the permanent switch, but, so far, he's struggling to reach the same heights.

arts.ttl: Will Celtic secure Champions League progression?
arts.sum: One more Champions League win should be enough to see Celtic through to the next stage and Brendan Rodgers has told his team to "play the game, not the occasion".

arts.ttl: English clubs chase Celtic's Palma - gossip
arts.sum: Celtic winger linked with English clubs as Hearts reportedly close in on Norwegian midfielder.
